scripts.i18n:check: npm run i18n:audit && npm run i18n:doctor && npm run prepare:i18n && node scripts/generate-i18n-resources.mjs --check
scripts.build:tsc:check: npm run prepare:i18n && npm run typecheck:main && npm run typecheck:preload && npm run typecheck:renderer
scripts.build:all: npm run build:tsc && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:tsc:check && npm run build:all && npm run smoke-test
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets appimage,deb,rpm,tar.gz,zip && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:linux:dir: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --package-only && npm run package:smoke-test:dir
scripts.build:linux:appimage: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets appimage && npm run package:smoke-test:linux:appimage
scripts.build:linux:deb: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets deb && npm run package:smoke-test:linux:deb
scripts.build:linux:rpm: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets rpm && npm run package:smoke-test:linux:rpm
scripts.build:linux:tar.gz: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets tar.gz && npm run package:smoke-test:linux:tar.gz
scripts.build:linux:zip: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform linux --arch x64 --targets zip && npm run package:smoke-test:linux:zip
scripts.build:win: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets portable,nsis,msix && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets portable && npm run package:smoke-test:win:portable
scripts.build:win:nsis: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets nsis && npm run package:smoke-test:win:nsis
scripts.build:win:msix: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets msix && npm run package:smoke-test:win:msix
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch $(node -p "process.arch") --targets dmg,zip && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch x64 --targets dmg,zip && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch arm64 --targets dmg,zip && npm run package:smoke-test
scripts.build:mac:x64:dmg: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch x64 --targets dmg && npm run package:smoke-test:mac:dmg
scripts.build:mac:x64:zip: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch x64 --targets zip && npm run package:smoke-test:mac:zip
scripts.build:mac:arm64:dmg: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch arm64 --targets dmg && npm run package:smoke-test:mac:dmg
scripts.build:mac:arm64:zip: npm run build:prod && node scripts/run-electron-forge.js --platform darwin --arch arm64 --targets zip && npm run package:smoke-test:mac:zip
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:38659 file:dist/preload/index.mjs file:dist/main/bootstrap.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && concurrently -k "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:preload" "npm run dev:electron"
